# feat(trust): add canonical ConstraintEnvelope (SPEC-07)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `c695004e4231` — feat(trust): add canonical ConstraintEnvelope (SPEC-07)

**Body**:

Three scattered ConstraintEnvelope implementations (EATP chain,
TrustPlane models, PACT config) unified into a single frozen
dataclass with five constraint dimensions, gradient thresholds,
posture ceiling, monotonic tightening via intersect(), deterministic
canonical JSON, and HMAC-SHA256 signing. NaN/Inf protection on all
numeric fields per trust-plane-security.md Rule 3.

71 unit tests covering construction, immutability, dimension
validation, intersect monotonicity, round-trip serialization,
canonical JSON determinism, YAML loading, and HMAC sign/verify.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
